qa_pair.question: Build an open-loop buck converter with input Vi=24 V and duty D=0.5, simulate it, and report the steady-state output voltage rounded to the nearest volt.
Build a boost converter with Vi=24 V and D=0.5, simulate, and report the steady-state output voltage rounded to the nearest volt.
Build an inverting buck-boost with Vi=24 V and D=0.5, simulate, and report the steady-state output voltage (with sign) rounded to the nearest volt.
For the open-loop buck (Vi=24), sweep the duty cycle D and report the steady-state output voltage at D=0.4, rounded to one decimal place.
Build the voltage-mode closed-loop buck with reference Vref=15 V and report the regulated steady-state output rounded to the nearest volt.
For the closed-loop buck, change the reference to Vref=10 V (model variable) and report the regulated steady-state output rounded to the nearest volt.
How many terminals does a Mosfet component have in the plecs-mcp knowledge base?
How many bundled PLECS demo templates have the word "flyback" in their name?
Run the control-to-output transfer-function analysis of buck_converter_with_analysis_tools and report its DC gain in dB rounded to the nearest integer.
How many bundled PLECS demo templates have the word "inverter" in their name or component types?
